message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

actor user as "user"
participant GStreamerPipeline as "Gstreamer Pipeline" #lightblue
box realsensesrc #white
    participant rs2src as "realsense\nrs::context.query_devices()" #lightgreen
end box
librealSense2 ->> libRealSense : select device by serial number 
note right of libRealselectDeviceBySerialNumberNote: Select Device 

loop for info in camera_info_list do  
  alt if supports(info) then   
     bool <- -device_get_supports()    
      const char* <--- get_string_from_enum_value(enum_type,value);     
       storeInfo();       
        gst_tag_setter_add_tags(...,...,..NULL,NULL);        
         note left addTagsAsMetadataNotes:Register per-stream metadata Gst tags          
          std vector<StreamProfile>> profiles = sensor.get_stream_profiles();           
           loop foreach profile p from supportedProfilesList create Profile object installProperties(p,optionsMapObjectClassInstallPropertyFuncPointerOptionNameValuePairsArraySizeOfOptionsPairssupportedVideoFormatsAndResolutionsSupportedFrameRatesPerFormatResolutionCombinationPixelFormatsColorSpacesEtcetera;            
            g_object_class_install_property(objectclasspropidnamepspecvaluearrayofsupportedoptionsperoptiontypeegexposuregainetcwithminmaxstepdefaultvaluesanddescriptionstringsforGUIwidgetsorcommandlineargumentswhenusinggstlaunchortoolslikeqv4l2vncserveretc.;             
             Note Left InstallAllRS Camera Options As Properties Or Command Line Arguments When Using Tools Like QVLC Server ETCETERA ;              
              Loop For Each Option Supported By Sensor Do If Supports Then Get Range Store In Map With Min Max Step Default Values And Description Strings Used Later On During Caps Negotiation Phase Between Source Element Downstream Elements Such As Video Converters Scalers Encoders Decoders Sinks ETCETERA .
